title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 4
full_text:
3.28.0 Hotfix 4
3.28.0 Hotfix 4
Fixed 2 instance crashes.
Fixed a client crash.
Temporary Minions which follow the player will now persist with you through area transitions from one combat area to another, excluding the hideout or hub areas like Kingsmarch. Buffs or stolen modifiers on these minions will not be carried over. Animate Weapon of Self Reflection specifically is not yet functional with this system, but we are working on a fix there as well.
Fixed a bug that caused Spectral Shield Throw to be thrown at character's feet.
